message:
feat(command,runtime): COMMAND LIST FILTERBY, RESET clears pub/sub, misc fixes

- Implement COMMAND LIST FILTERBY MODULE/ACLCAT/PATTERN (Redis 7.0+):
  MODULE returns empty (no modules), ACLCAT filters via
  commands_in_acl_category(), PATTERN uses glob_match()
- RESET now clears pub/sub subscriptions from global registry and
  per-client Store before resetting session state
- Move hello_bulk() before test module to fix items-after-test-module
  clippy error
- Suppress dead_code on ACL_UNKNOWN_SUBCOMMAND_ERROR constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
